# Jira-ready issue — BL-BENCH-049

## Summary
Canonical Evaluation Methodology and Test-Case-Specific Evaluation Profiles

## Issue type
Story / Process Governance

## Description
Create a versioned, reproducible evaluation-methodology layer for benchmark evidence packages. Add one canonical methodology at package root and one inherited test-case-specific evaluation profile inside each test case. Bind every audit and score to the exact effective methodology fingerprint and block canonical acceptance when the methodology is missing, stale, incompatible or improperly overridden.

## Business value
Scores become reproducible, auditable and transferable. External evaluators can understand not only which runs and artifacts were tested, but exactly how quality was assessed and which test-specific rules were applied.

## Acceptance criteria
See `049_CANONICAL_EVALUATION_METHODOLOGY_AND_TEST_CASE_PROFILES.md` for the complete normative specification and Definition of Done.

## Status
OPEN
